description_long: This is a wooden house elevated on sturdy posts, featuring a prominent red gable roof with two dormer windows on the front side. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. A wooden staircase leads up to a small landing and entry door on the side, providing access to the main living area above ground level. The roof includes skylights on the rear slope, allowing natural light into the upper floor. The house has symmetrical window arrangements on the front dormers and a single window on the rear gable. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern elements, suitable for suburban or semi-urban neighborhoods.
description: Elevated wooden house with a red gable roof, front dormer windows, and a side staircase entry. Features symmetrical window placement and skylights on the rear roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing two dormer windows, the main red gable roof, and the side staircase leading to the upper entry.
description_view_1: Side gable view with no windows, highlighting the wooden plank siding and the roof's dormer extensions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two skylights on the roof and a single window on the upper floor, with the staircase partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side gable view featuring the entry door at the top of the staircase and a single window above, with the dormers visible on the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front dormers, single window on rear gable, skylights on rear roof
attribute_entryway_design: Side entry with wooden staircase and landing, single door, no porch or columns, simple and functional
